title: Luxury Product Atlas Board AI
sourceTitle: Luxury Product Atlas Board AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Luxury 2:3 product atlas poster for AURELIA SKIN, built around seven clean studio skincare bottles and jars floating naturally on a warm cream background. Subject: frosted glass serum bottle with soft gold cap and matching cream jar anchors the center as the dominant product family, while hydrating serum, barrier cream, cleansing milk, travel mist, night mask, eye balm, body oil, morning glow routine, travel mini kit, night repair ritual, green tea extract, ceramide, hyaluronic acid, niacinamide, oat milk, and calm bathroom shelf, hotel vanity moment, Sunday self-care tray appear as curated sidebar and lower-section modules. Scene: Warm cream museum-quality editorial board with soft gold accents, premium neutral tones, natural material cues, and clean collectible coffee-table-book atmosphere. Composition: Fixed portrait 2:3 luxury brand atlas hierarchy: large elegant headline, hero product dominance in the center, left MUST TRY sidebar, right SIGNATURE EXPERIENCE sidebar, bottom QUALITY INGREDIENTS strip, bottom-right ICONIC EXPERIENCES module, footer brand and tagline, generous white space, and strict aligned magazine grid. Signature Elements: Floating product photography without plates, saucers, coasters, wooden trays, serving boards, pedestals, or stands; only the central hero product may use an integrated compositional base when needed. Style: Photorealistic luxury commercial product photography blended with premium editorial infographic design, refined serif typography, small line-art icons, soft realistic shadows, natural reflections, and museum-quality presentation. Color Palette: Warm cream background, soft gold accents, premium neutrals, restrained brand-color details, natural material tones, and timeless editorial contrast. Lighting: Professional studio lighting with soft realistic shadows, natural reflections on product surfaces, gentle gold highlights, and clean readable label illumination. Typography: AURELIA SKIN and Daily Rituals, Quiet Glow appear in the footer; Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

promptTranslations.fr:
Utilisez le prompt anglais ci-dessous pour générer l'image ; conservez les textes visibles, les noms de marque, les valeurs de variables et les paramètres en anglais.

imagePrompts.title: Luxury Product Atlas Board Variant 01

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Luxury 2:3 product atlas poster for NIGHT ROAST, built around seven premium coffee tins, bean bags, and bottled cold brew products floating naturally on a warm cream background. Subject: matte black coffee tin with gold label and one matching cold brew bottle anchors the center as the dominant product family, while espresso blend, single-origin beans, cold brew bottle, drip bag box, oat latte carton, cacao nib jar, vanilla salt tin, slow morning pour-over, office focus break, weekend tasting flight, single-origin beans, oat milk foam, cacao nibs, citrus peel, vanilla salt, and quiet kitchen counter, design-studio coffee break, late-night listening session appear as curated sidebar and lower-section modules. Scene: Warm cream museum-quality editorial board with soft gold accents, premium neutral tones, natural material cues, and clean collectible coffee-table-book atmosphere. Composition: Fixed portrait 2:3 luxury brand atlas hierarchy: large elegant headline, hero product dominance in the center, left MUST TRY sidebar, right SIGNATURE EXPERIENCE sidebar, bottom QUALITY INGREDIENTS strip, bottom-right ICONIC EXPERIENCES module, footer brand and tagline, generous white space, and strict aligned magazine grid. Signature Elements: Floating product photography without plates, saucers, coasters, wooden trays, serving boards, pedestals, or stands; only the central hero product may use an integrated compositional base when needed. Style: Photorealistic luxury commercial product photography blended with premium editorial infographic design, refined serif typography, small line-art icons, soft realistic shadows, natural reflections, and museum-quality presentation. Color Palette: Warm cream background, soft gold accents, premium neutrals, restrained brand-color details, natural material tones, and timeless editorial contrast. Lighting: Professional studio lighting with soft realistic shadows, natural reflections on product surfaces, gentle gold highlights, and clean readable label illumination. Typography: NIGHT ROAST and Collected Notes for Slow Coffee appear in the footer; Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
